text: <|emotion:enthusiasm|>Welcome to today's lesson! <|sfx:laughter|>Haha, I'm excited to get started.
title: intro

text: Let me walk you through the core concepts, one step at a time. <|prosody:pause|> First, let's define what we mean by machine learning.
title: concept_definition

text: <|prosody:speed_slow|>Think of it like teaching a child to recognize animals. <|prosody:pause|> You show enough examples, and eventually they learn the pattern.
title: analogy

text: <|emotion:contentment|>And that's the beauty of it — once you grasp the intuition, the math becomes much more approachable.
title: conclusion
